parameters.query: SELECT o.org_id, o.slug, o.name, o.description, o.logo_url, o.rsi_url, o.site_url, o.discord_invite, o.is_visible, o.is_recruiting, o.source, o.member_count, (o.org_id IS NOT NULL) AS in_db FROM (VALUES ($1::text)) AS x(slug_param) LEFT JOIN sc_orgs o ON o.slug = x.slug_param

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('org_id', so.org_id, 'slug', so.slug, 'name', so.name, 'logo_url', so.logo_url, 'rsi_url', so.rsi_url, 'site_url', so.site_url, 'discord_invite', so.discord_invite, 'is_visible', so.is_visible, 'is_recruiting', so.is_recruiting, 'member_count', so.member_count, 'is_main_org', uo.is_main_org, 'org_role', uo.org_role, 'synced_at', uo.synced_at) ORDER BY uo.is_main_org DESC, so.name ASC), '[]'::json) AS orgs FROM user_orgs uo JOIN sc_orgs so ON so.org_id = uo.org_id WHERE uo.user_id = $1::uuid

parameters.jsCode:
const dbRow = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, org_id: dbRow.org_id, slug: dbRow.slug } }];

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('slug', slug, 'name', name, 'description', description, 'logo_url', logo_url, 'rsi_url', rsi_url, 'site_url', site_url, 'discord_invite', discord_invite, 'is_recruiting', is_recruiting, 'member_count', member_count) ORDER BY name ASC), '[]'::json) AS orgs FROM sc_orgs WHERE is_visible = true OR is_recruiting = true
